name: Clayton Construction
message: Clayton Construction Company, Inc. is a leading general contractor in the southeast, boasting over forty years of experience in delivering high-quality construction services. Their extensive portfolio includes projects in various sectors such as industrial, healthcare, educational, and commercial spaces. The company is dedicated to building strong relationships with clients through a comprehensive design/build process and excellent post-construction follow-up. Recognized as one of the fastest-growing companies in South Carolina, Clayton Construction prioritizes safety, quality, and innovative technology in project execution.
